message:
test(proptest): add merge_issue and three_way_merge property tests (beads_rust-h9pv)

15 property-based tests covering core merge invariants:
- determinism (same inputs → same output)
- all-None → NoAction
- base-only → Delete
- new on one side only → Keep
- unchanged + deleted → Delete
- all identical → Keep(left)
- both-modified Manual → Conflict(BothModified)
- PreferLocal/PreferExternal strategy correctness
- tombstone protection (cannot resurrect)
- three-way all-identical keeps all
- new-right-only all kept
- single-ID action coverage (at most 1 action per ID)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
